summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) No test files provided despite explicit TDD requirement ('write failing test FIRST'). Workflow runs `bun test` against non-existent tests. (2) Missing `act-result.txt` artifact required by spec. (3) Actions not pinned to SHA (checkout@v4, setup-bun@v2 use semantic versions, not 40-char commit SHAs). (4) Workflow Report Results step (lines 33-43) has logic bug: validation steps use `continue-on-error: true` but outcomes never checked to fail job. (5) No test fixtures, test harness, or infrastructure for running tests through `act` as required. Code quality is decent (validator.ts/cli.ts have good types, error handling, separation of concerns), but deliverable is incomplete—it lacks entire testing layer.
